text.title: Perplexity AI Research Workflow Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: decompose
step.action: Split into ≥2 atomic sub-queries; record list.

step.name: execute-with-recency
step.action: Call Perplexity API per sub-query with recency_filter='year' (or tighter).

step.name: rate-confidence
step.action: Assign H/M/L per claim based on source count + agreement + counter-evidence.

step.name: synthesize
step.action: Combine into report; counter-evidence noted explicitly.

step.name: verify-and-sign
step.action: Researcher verifies citations open + cited claim appears; signs verified_by.
step.decision-gate: If any citation broken, loop back to execute step.
